title: Tailoring & Dressmaking Graduates Celebrate New Skills
summary: A new group of young women completed the UCDP Tailoring and Dressmaking Programme, gaining vocational skills for economic independence.
content:
A new group of young women completed the UCDP Tailoring and Dressmaking Programme this month, gaining practical vocational skills that will help them earn an income and support their families.

## About the Programme

The Tailoring and Dressmaking Programme runs over several months and teaches participants professional sewing, pattern-making, garment construction, and basic business skills.

Graduates receive a certificate and are supported to start small tailoring businesses or seek employment in the garment sector.

*Update this article with names of graduates, photos, and quotes from participants.*
